name: Presence
description: You modify your presence causing the attention of creatures within a very short (5 unit) radius to become magically drawn to you. While you concentrate on this spell, at the start of each creature's turn, make a spell check against their resilience. On a success, their attack checks have a penalty dice against anyone other than you while they remain in your spell.
charge: Creatures that fail also suffer a -1 penalty to their defense checks.
